title: Detecting duplicate information within a column or row.
excerpt: It’d be nice to be able to easily detect duplicate information within a column like you can with the conditional formatting feature in excel.

posts.author: Chase.Neely (Chase N)
posts.cookedHtml:
It’d be nice to be able to easily detect duplicate information within a column like you can with the conditional formatting feature in excel.
